Package tellui.component

Class Slider

java.lang.Object
tellui.core.base.View
tellui.core.base.SpatialView
tellui.core.base.ContentView
tellui.core.base.Component
tellui.core.RangeControl
tellui.core.LinearRangeControl
tellui.component.Slider
All Implemented Interfaces:
Scrollable, ValuePreviewSource, Visible
public class Slider extends LinearRangeControl
A slider component for selecting values within a linear range. The Slider extends LinearRangeControl to provide a draggable interface with a visual progress indicator that fills according to the current value.

Users can click or drag anywhere on the slider track to set the value, with the progress indicator updating in real-time.

  • Constructor Details

    • Slider

      public Slider(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Constructs a Slider with specified position and dimensions. The slider is initialized with a progress indicator and default value range.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the slider's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the slider's top-left corner
      w - the width of the slider
      h - the height of the slider

    • Slider

      public Slider()
      Constructs a Slider with default maximum size, centered on the screen. This is a convenience constructor for creating a centered slider.

  • Method Details

    • swapOrientation

      public void swapOrientation()
      Swaps the orientation of the slider (horizontal to vertical or vice versa). Updates the progress indicator accordingly.
      Overrides:
      swapOrientation in class LinearRangeControl

    • getProgressStrokeWeight

      public final float getProgressStrokeWeight()
      Gets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the progress indicator.
      Returns:
      the current progress stroke weight

    • setProgressStrokeWeight

      public final void setProgressStrokeWeight(int weight)
      Sets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the progress indicator.
      Parameters:
      weight - the stroke weight for the progress indicator border
